name: token-optimizer
description: Token Optimizer runs validation commands in a workspace, keeps raw logs out of context, and returns compact verdicts via the token_optimizer MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Run local validation and summarize logs with a local LLM.
interface.longDescription: Validate code changes, triage failures, review changed files, check regressions, digest noisy commands, and scout codebases without flooding the conversation with raw logs.
defaultPrompt: Use Token Optimizer to validate my current code changes.
Use Token Optimizer to triage the failing test log.
